summary: Deterministic Homepage Personalization System VERIFIED - ALL 17 BACKEND TESTS PASSED + ALL FRONTEND TESTS PASSED. New API contract (personalization, hero, rows[], features[], live_stats) working correctly. Row ordering follows rules: continue_stories=rank1 when user has active stories. Feature ranking: story-video-studio=rank1 for test user (highest affinity). Cold start: personalization.enabled=false for anonymous users. Profile decay (0.98 multiplier) working.
critical_code_review_comments: personalization_service.py: EVENT WEIGHTS (card_click=1, watch_start=2, continue_click=5, watch_complete=8, share_click=10, generation_start=6, generation_complete=12) - VERIFIED
personalization_service.py: DECAY=0.98 applied to all affinities before adding new signal - VERIFIED
engagement.py: story-feed returns new contract (personalization, hero, rows[], features[], live_stats) - VERIFIED
growth_analytics.py: POST /api/growth/event triggers update_profile_on_event via background_tasks - VERIFIED
growth_analytics.py: POST /api/growth/events/batch triggers profile updates for all events with user_id - VERIFIED
Dashboard.js: Renders rows[] in API-determined order (dumb renderer) - VERIFIED
Dashboard.js: Renders features[] in API-determined score order - VERIFIED
growthTracker.js: Reads user_id from localStorage and includes in events - VERIFIED
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user profile with 8 events
context_for_next_testing_agent: Personalization system fully verified. Key findings: 1) New API contract working (personalization, hero, rows[], features[], live_stats), 2) Test user has 8 events with high watercolor + story-video-studio affinity, 3) continue_stories is rank 1 (user has active stories), 4) story-video-studio is top-ranked feature, 5) Anonymous users get personalization.enabled=false, 6) Profile decay (0.98) working, 7) Event tracking updates profile via background tasks.
